subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the All-Bountiful unto them that have believed in God on the Day of Return. Verily, We have revealed unto each one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الوهاب للذین آمنوا بالله فی یوم الماب انا نزلنا لکل واحد من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
